Draw out storyboard/scenes (if applicable)
Write out bullets points or detailed script
• Opening hook and veiwer’s outcome
• Create open loop (surprise or hot tip)
• Main content (inform/entertain/inspire)
• Inject humor throughout (if applicable)
• Include at least one engaging story
• Establish credibility (subtle or direct)
• Plan for multiple pattern interrupts
• Ask to subscribe, like and comment
• Question or contest for comments
• Add a call to action at end (optional)
Create optimization plan (see other checklist)
SCRIPT AND CONTENT
Great job… now make your next video!
Grant Cardone Enterprises, Inc · chat@grantcardone.com · 800-368-5771 · GrantCardone.com
Material is copyrighted and may not be reposted, reproduced or resold. Failure to comply will result in full prosecution of the law.
VIDEO CREATION CHECKLIST
Video is shot in 4K (smart phone is fine)
Lighting is adequate and focused on subject
Sound is crisp and no background noise
Recorded wide enough to punch in and out
Capture backup audio and video if possible
Run test of audio and video before shooting!
SCENE AND EQUIPMENT
Record all a-roll video footage (If applicable)
• Practice out loud before you record
• Use simple vocabulary (avoid jargon)
• Remain conversational in your delivery
• Let loose! Vary volume, tone, cadence
Find b-roll footage and music (if applicable)
Order/create needed graphics (if applicable)
Make round 1 video edits (hard cuts, layering)
Make round 2 video edits (jumps, punches)
Make round 3 video edits (music, graphics)
RECORDING AND EDITING
